Discovery transcript excerpt.

Stakeholders: Mara from Product, Ionut from Ops, and Vera from Finance.
Decision: phase one should focus on lead intake, proposal generation, signed contract evidence, invoice tracking, and tax export.
Scope change: client also wants PayPal fee reconciliation.
Dates: kickoff 2026-06-10, first review 2026-06-17, final handoff 2026-07-01.
Risks: old spreadsheets have mixed encodings and duplicate client names.
Action item: send a proposal with three milestones and clear acceptance criteria.
